title: Junior Investment Banker at NHB Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Junior Investment Banker at NHB Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
NHB Holdings Services is actively seeking a talented and motivated Investment Banker to join our dynamic team in Vijayawada. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About NHB Holdings Services:
NHB Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NHB Holdings Services!
